howFarInAdvance.q: How far in advance should I book?
howFarInAdvance.a: We recommend booking at least 3-5 days in advance, especially during peak season (June-September). However, some photographers accept last-minute bookings.

whatIfRains.a: Your photographer will suggest alternative covered locations or reschedule for free if weather conditions are unfavorable.

howReceivePhotos.q: How do I receive my photos?
howReceivePhotos.a: You'll receive a link to your private, password-protected gallery. All photos are professionally edited and available for high-resolution download — individually or as a full ZIP archive. Delivery time varies by photographer and is shown on each package.

requestLocations.a: Absolutely! While your photographer will suggest the best spots, you're welcome to request specific locations. They'll let you know if any require permits or have timing considerations.

whatToWear.a: Your photographer can provide styling tips based on your chosen location. Generally, solid colors and classic styles photograph best. Avoid large logos and busy patterns.

conciergeMatching.q: What if I don't know which photographer to choose?
conciergeMatching.a: No problem! Use our free concierge matching service. Just tell us your location, dates, group size, and budget — our team will review your request, talk to photographers, and send you 2-3 hand-picked options who are available and perfect for your shoot. You then simply choose your favorite and book.

faq.metaTitle: Vacation Photoshoot Portugal FAQ — Pricing, Booking & More
faq.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about booking a vacation photographer in Portugal. Pricing, cancellation policy, delivery times, locations, and more.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Vacation Photoshoot in Portugal — Pricing, Booking, Delivery & More

howDoesItWork.question: How does Photo Portugal work?
howDoesItWork.answer: You have two ways to book: browse photographers yourself — view portfolios, read verified reviews, and book directly. Or use our free concierge matching service — tell us your preferences and we'll hand-pick 2-3 photographers for you. Either way, payments are secure and your photos are delivered to a private gallery. Learn more on our How It Works page.

cost.question: How much does a photoshoot cost?
cost.answer: Prices vary by photographer and package, typically ranging from €120 for a 30-minute quick session to €500+ for a full-day experience. Each photographer sets their own prices and packages, which you can see on their profile page. See our pricing page for an overview.

howToBook.question: How do I book a photographer?
howToBook.answer: You can browse photographers yourself — pick one you like, choose a package, select your date and time, and send a booking request. Or use our free concierge matching — tell us your preferences and we'll send you 2-3 hand-picked options to choose from. Either way, the photographer confirms within 24 hours and your payment is held securely until photos are delivered.

conciergeMatching.question: What if I don't know which photographer to choose?
conciergeMatching.answer: Use our free concierge matching service. Tell us your location, dates, group size, and budget — our team will talk to photographers, check availability, and send you 2-3 hand-picked options who are perfect for your shoot. You simply choose your favorite and book. It's completely free and there's no obligation.

paymentSecure.question: How does payment work? Is it secure?
paymentSecure.answer: All payments are processed securely through Stripe, trusted by millions of businesses worldwide. Your payment is held in escrow — we don't release it to the photographer until you receive and accept your photos. This means you're always protected. You can pay with credit/debit cards, Apple Pay, or Google Pay.

cancelBooking.question: Can I cancel my booking?
cancelBooking.answer: Yes, you can cancel through your dashboard. Cancellation 7+ days before the shoot gives you a full refund. Between 3–7 days: 50% refund. Less than 3 days: no refund (the photographer reserved their time for you). See our Terms of Service for full details.

reschedule.question: Can I reschedule my booking?
reschedule.answer: Yes. One free reschedule is included if you request it 48+ hours before the shoot. Rescheduling due to bad weather is always free for both parties. For changes within 48 hours, contact your photographer directly — most are flexible and happy to find an alternative time.

photographerCancels.question: What happens if the photographer cancels?
photographerCancels.answer: You receive a 100% refund, always. If the cancellation is last-minute (less than 48 hours), we'll also try to find a replacement photographer for you. Photographers who cancel repeatedly may be removed from the platform.

deliveryTime.question: How long until I receive my photos?
deliveryTime.answer: Delivery time depends on the package you choose — each package shows the estimated delivery days on the photographer's profile (typically 3–14 days). Once ready, you'll receive a link to a private, password-protected gallery. You'll first see watermarked previews to review the photos. Once you approve the delivery, you'll get access to the full-resolution images and can download everything as a ZIP archive.

notHappy.question: What if I'm not happy with the photos?
notHappy.answer: You have 7 days after delivery to accept your photos or open a dispute. Valid reasons for a dispute include: significantly fewer photos than promised, wrong location, severe technical issues, or photographer no-show. We'll work with both parties to find a fair resolution — reshoot, partial refund, or full refund. Note that subjective style preferences are not grounds for a refund, so review portfolios carefully before booking. See our Terms of Service for details.

galleryAccess.question: How long can I access my photo gallery?
galleryAccess.answer: Your private gallery stays accessible for 90 days after delivery. We recommend downloading all your photos within this period. You can download them individually or as a complete ZIP archive.

rain.question: What if it rains on my photoshoot day?
rain.answer: Weather rescheduling is always free for both parties — no penalties, no fees. Either you or the photographer can request a reschedule due to weather conditions unsuitable for outdoor photography. Discuss a backup plan with your photographer when you book.

reviewsVerified.question: Are the reviews verified?
reviewsVerified.answer: Yes. All reviews on Photo Portugal are tied to completed bookings. Only clients who have had a confirmed photoshoot can leave a review, ensuring authentic and trustworthy feedback.

locationsAvailable.question: What locations are available?
locationsAvailable.answer: We cover {locationCount}+ locations across Portugal, including Lisbon, Porto, Algarve, Sintra, Madeira, Azores, and many more.

speakEnglish.question: Do photographers speak English?
speakEnglish.answer: Most photographers on our platform speak English. You can filter photographers by language on the catalog page. Many also speak Portuguese, Spanish, French, and German.

becomePhotographer.question: How do I become a photographer on Photo Portugal?
becomePhotographer.answer: Click 'Join as Photographer' and create your account. Set up your profile, upload portfolio photos, create packages, and start receiving booking requests. We offer Free, Pro, and Premium plans with different features and commission rates.

photographerPlans.question: What are the photographer plans?
photographerPlans.answer: We offer three plans: Free (20% commission, 1 location), Pro at €29/month (15% commission, 5 locations), and Premium at €59/month (10% commission, all locations, custom profile URL, priority support). All plans include up to 100 portfolio photos. Visit our pricing page for a full comparison.

earlyBird.question: What is the Early Bird program?
earlyBird.answer: We're offering exclusive benefits to our first photographers. The first 10 photographers (Founding tier) get the Premium plan free forever with an exclusive "Founding Photographer" badge. The next 25 get Premium free for 6 months, and the next 50 get Pro free for 3 months. Spots are limited and first-come-first-served. Check available spots.

clientNoShow.question: What happens if I don't show up to my photoshoot?
clientNoShow.answer: If you don't show up to your scheduled photoshoot without prior notice, no refund will be issued. The full payment goes to the photographer as compensation for their reserved time. If your plans change, we strongly recommend cancelling in advance — cancellation 7+ days before the shoot gives you a full refund, and 3–7 days gives you a 50% refund.

photographerNoShow.question: What happens if my photographer doesn't show up?
photographerNoShow.answer: If your photographer fails to show up, you'll receive a full 100% refund. We recommend waiting 15 minutes at the meeting point, then opening a dispute through your dashboard. Our team will process your refund promptly. For photographers who repeatedly fail to show up, the platform will attempt to find a replacement photographer for affected clients, and the photographer may face account suspension.

whenMoneyReleased.question: When is my payment released to the photographer?
whenMoneyReleased.answer: Your payment is held securely in escrow by Stripe until after your photos are delivered. Once the photographer delivers your photos, you have 7 days to review and either accept the delivery or open a dispute. When you accept, the payment is released to the photographer. If you don't respond within 14 days after delivery, the payment is automatically released.

forceMajeure.question: What happens in case of extreme weather or emergencies?
forceMajeure.answer: In cases of force majeure — natural disasters, severe weather warnings, pandemics, or other extraordinary circumstances beyond anyone's control — both parties are entitled to a full refund or a free reschedule at no penalty. Neither the client nor the photographer is held responsible. Contact our support team or open a request through your dashboard.

lateDelivery.question: What if my photos are delivered late?
lateDelivery.answer: Photos should be delivered within the timeframe agreed in your chosen package. If delivery is 3 or more days late, you may request a partial refund of up to 20% of the package price. If delivery is 14 or more days late, you are entitled to a full refund. You can open a dispute through your dashboard to request a refund for late delivery.

about.metaTitle: About Photo Portugal — Our Story & Mission
about.metaDescription: Photo Portugal connects tourists with talented local photographers across Portugal. Learn about our mission and why travelers trust us.
about.heroSubtitle: Because the best memories deserve more than a selfie stick.

theProblem.title: The problem
theProblem.text: Portugal is one of the most photogenic countries in Europe. Lisbon's golden light, Porto's dramatic riverfront, Sintra's fairytale palaces, the Algarve's raw coastal beauty — it's a photographer's dream. Yet every year, millions of tourists come home with nothing but blurry selfies and awkward "can you take our photo?" shots from strangers.

ourMission.title: Our mission
ourMission.text1: We believe every trip to Portugal deserves to be captured beautifully. That's why we created Photo Portugal — a platform where travelers can instantly find and book talented local photographers who know the best spots, the perfect timing, and how to make you feel comfortable in front of the camera.
ourMission.text2: No more awkward poses. No more asking strangers. No more missing yourself from your own vacation photos. Just real, beautiful memories captured by someone who knows this country inside out.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.text: Choose your path: browse photographer portfolios yourself and book directly, or use our free concierge service — tell us your preferences and we'll hand-pick 2-3 photographers for you. Pay securely through Stripe — your money is held safely until your photos are delivered. Your photographer will meet you at the location, guide you to the most photogenic spots, and make the whole experience relaxed and fun. You'll receive professionally edited photos in a private, password-protected gallery — view online, download individually, or grab the full collection as a ZIP archive.

realReviews.title: Every review is real
realReviews.text: Reviews are tied to completed bookings. No fake testimonials, no incentivized reviews — just honest feedback from travelers like you.

verifiedPhotographers.text: Photographers go through phone verification and identity checks before earning a verified badge. You always know who you're booking.

securePayments.text: Pay with cards, Apple Pay, or Google Pay — all processed through Stripe, trusted by millions of businesses worldwide. Your payment is held securely until your photos are delivered and accepted, so you're always protected.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Photo Portugal privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.

informationWeCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.intro: When you use Photo Portugal, we may collect the following information:

items.account: Account information: name, email address, profile photo (from Google OAuth or uploaded), phone number (if provided)
items.photographer: Photographer profiles: bio, languages, locations, portfolio photos, pricing, availability
items.booking: Booking data: dates, times, locations, session type, number of participants, and any special requests
items.messages: Messages: communications between clients and photographers through our platform
items.payment: Payment information: billing details processed securely by Stripe (we do not store your full card number)
items.usage: Usage data: pages visited, device type, browser, IP address, referring URL, and interaction patterns
items.cookies: Cookies and similar technologies: session tokens, authentication state, and analytics identifiers (see Section 8)

legalBasis.title: 2. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:

items.contract: Contract performance (Article 6(1)(b)): processing necessary to fulfil bookings between clients and photographers, manage your account, facilitate payments, and deliver the services you request through our platform.
items.consent: Consent (Article 6(1)(a)): for non-essential cookies, marketing emails, and promotional communications. You may withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.
items.legitimateInterest: Legitimate interest (Article 6(1)(f)): for platform security and fraud prevention, anonymous analytics to improve our service, enforcing our Terms of Service, and communicating essential service updates.
items.legalObligation: Legal obligation (Article 6(1)(c)): to comply with tax, accounting, and other legal requirements applicable under Portuguese and EU law.

items.provide: To provide, operate, and improve our photography marketplace services
items.facilitate: To facilitate bookings and communication between clients and photographers
items.display: To display photographer profiles and portfolios publicly on the platform
items.payments: To process payments and issue invoices
items.notifications: To send booking confirmations, reminders, and service-related notifications
items.marketing: To send marketing communications (only with your consent, and you can opt out at any time)
items.fraud: To prevent fraud, detect abuse, and ensure platform security
items.analytics: To analyse usage patterns and improve user experience
items.legal: To comply with legal obligations, including tax and accounting requirements

informationSharing.title: 4. Information Sharing & Third-Party Services
informationSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only in these cases:

items.bookingParties: Between booking parties: clients see photographer profiles and public portfolios; photographers see client name, contact details, and booking information necessary to deliver the service.
items.serviceProviders: Service providers (data processors): we use the following third-party services to operate our platform:

processors.stripe: Stripe — payment processing. Stripe receives your billing details to process transactions securely.
processors.google: Google — OAuth authentication and sign-in. Google receives your authentication token when you sign in with Google.
processors.digitalocean: DigitalOcean — cloud hosting and infrastructure. Your data is stored on DigitalOcean servers.
processors.twilio: Twilio — SMS notifications for booking updates and verification. Your phone number is shared with Twilio when SMS notifications are enabled.

informationSharing.legalRequirements: Legal requirements: if required by law, regulation, legal process, or enforceable governmental request, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of Photo Portugal, our users, or the public.

dataProcessing.title: 5. Data Processing Agreements
dataProcessing.content: We have entered into Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) with all third-party processors listed above, as required by Article 28 of the GDPR. These agreements ensure that our processors handle your personal data in compliance with European data protection law, implement appropriate technical and organisational security measures, and only process data on our documented instructions.

internationalTransfers.title: 6. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.intro: Photo Portugal is based in Portugal and primarily stores data within the European Union. However, some of our third-party processors may process personal data outside the EU/EEA:

items.stripe: Stripe processes payment data in the United States and other jurisdictions where Stripe operates.
items.google: Google may process authentication data in the United States and other global data centres.

internationalTransfers.safeguards: Where data is transferred outside the EU/EEA, we ensure adequate safeguards are in place, including Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission, supplementary measures where necessary, and adequacy decisions where applicable. You may request a copy of the relevant safeguards by contacting us at

dataRetention.title: 7. Data Retention
dataRetention.intro: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy:

items.account: Account data: retained while your account is active, plus 2 years after account deletion to handle any post-deletion enquiries, disputes, or legal claims.
items.booking: Booking and transaction data: retained for 7 years after the booking date to comply with Portuguese tax and accounting obligations.
items.messages: Messages: retained for 1 year after the associated booking is completed, then permanently deleted.
items.analytics: Analytics data: retained for 26 months, then automatically aggregated or deleted.
items.marketing: Marketing consent records: retained for as long as we send marketing communications, plus 3 years after consent withdrawal for accountability purposes.

dataRetention.deletion: When data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or irreversibly anonymised.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies
cookies.intro: We use the following types of cookies:

items.essential: Essential cookies: required for authentication, session management, and core platform functionality. These cannot be disabled.
items.analytics: Analytics cookies: used to understand how visitors interact with our site and to improve our service. These are only set with your consent.

cookies.noTracking: We do not use third-party advertising or tracking cookies. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings or our cookie consent banner.

dataSecurity.title: 9. Data Security
dataSecurity.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data, including:

items.https: HTTPS/TLS encryption for all data in transit
items.hashing: Secure password hashing (bcrypt) for locally-created accounts
items.rbac: Role-based access controls on our database and admin systems
items.reviews: Regular security reviews and dependency updates

dataSecurity.disclaimer: However, no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your personal data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

yourRights.title: 10. Your Rights Under the GDPR
yourRights.intro: As a data subject, you have the following rights under the GDPR:

items.access: Right of access (Article 15): request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
items.rectification: Right to rectification (Article 16): request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data.
items.erasure: Right to erasure (Article 17): request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal retention obligations.
items.restriction: Right to restriction of processing (Article 18): request that we limit how we use your data in certain circumstances.
items.portability: Right to data portability (Article 20): receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format (such as JSON or CSV), and transmit that data to another controller without hindrance.
items.object: Right to object (Article 21): object to processing based on legitimate interest, including profiling.
items.withdrawConsent: Right to withdraw consent: where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

yourRights.exercise: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at
yourRights.responseTime: We will respond to your request within 30 days.

complaint.title: 11. Right to Lodge a Complaint
complaint.intro: If you believe that our processing of your personal data infringes the GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. In Portugal, the competent authority is:
complaint.cnpdName: Comissão Nacional de Proteção de Dados (CNPD)
complaint.otherAuthority: You may also lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority in your EU/EEA member state of residence, place of work, or the place of the alleged infringement.

children.title: 12. Children's Privacy
children.content: Photo Portugal is not intended for use by children under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 18. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal data, please contact us at
children.contentAfterEmail: , and we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

businessTransfers.title: 13. Business Transfers
businessTransfers.content: If Photo Portugal is involved in a merger, acquisition, asset sale, or bankruptcy, your personal data may be transferred as part of that transaction. In such an event, we will notify all affected users at least 30 days before the transfer of personal data and before any new privacy policy takes effect. You will have the option to delete your account and data before the transfer is completed.

changes.title: 14. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technology, legal requirements, or other factors. If we make material changes, we will notify you by email or by posting a prominent notice on our platform at least 14 days before the changes take effect. Your continued use of Photo Portugal after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 15. Contact
contact.intro: For any privacy-related questions, data subject requests, or concerns about this policy, contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Photo Portugal terms of service — booking, payments, cancellations, refunds, and platform rules.

overview.title: 1. Overview
overview.content: Photo Portugal ("we," "us," "our") operates a marketplace platform at photoportugal.com that connects tourists ("clients") with professional photographers ("photographers") in Portugal. By using our platform, you agree to these terms.

items.accurate: You must provide accurate information when creating an account
items.security: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
items.oneAccount: One person may not maintain more than one account
items.age: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account

items.confirmation: Booking requests are not confirmed until the photographer accepts
items.payment: Full payment is collected at the time of booking and held securely until photo delivery
items.showUp: You agree to show up at the agreed time and location
items.reviews: Reviews must be honest and based on your actual experience
items.commercial: You may not use photographer's images for commercial purposes without their written consent

items.skills: You represent that you have the skills and equipment to provide professional photography services
items.portfolio: Portfolio photos must be your own original work
items.response: You must respond to booking requests within 24 hours
items.delivery: You agree to deliver photos within the timeframe stated in your package
items.taxes: You are responsible for your own taxes, insurance, and legal compliance
items.subscription: Subscription fees (Pro, Premium plans) are billed monthly and non-refundable
items.noOffPlatform: You are strictly prohibited from soliciting or conducting business with clients who contacted you through Photo Portugal outside of the platform. This includes exchanging contact details, redirecting clients to personal websites, or accepting direct payments. Violation of this policy will result in immediate and permanent account termination

paymentsEscrow.title: 5. Payments & Escrow
paymentsEscrow.intro: All payments are processed securely through Stripe. When a client books a photoshoot, the full amount is charged and held in escrow by Photo Portugal. The payment flow works as follows:

items.clientPays: Client pays the full package price at the time of booking
items.fundsHeld: Funds are held securely until the photographer delivers the photos and the client accepts the delivery
items.released: Once the client accepts the delivery, the photographer's share (minus platform commission) is released to them
items.autoRelease: If the client does not respond within 14 days after delivery, the payment is automatically released to the photographer
items.support: If the client does not accept or dispute within 7 days, the photographer may contact our support team to resolve the situation
items.autoCancellation: If the photographer has not confirmed the booking and payment has not been received within 48 hours of the booking request, the booking is automatically cancelled and a full refund is issued to the client

commission.title: 6. Platform Commission
commission.intro: Photo Portugal charges a commission on each completed booking. Commission rates depend on the photographer's plan:
commission.details: Commission is deducted from the photographer's payout when the booking is completed. If a booking is cancelled by the client 7+ days before the shoot, no commission is charged. For late cancellations where a partial payment is retained by the photographer, commission applies to the retained amount.

cancellationByClient.title: 7. Cancellation by Client
cancellationByClient.intro: Clients may cancel a confirmed booking through their dashboard. Refund amounts depend on timing:

table.row3When: Less than 3 days before the shoot

cancellationByClient.note: When a partial or no refund applies, the retained amount is paid to the photographer as compensation for their reserved time.

cancellationByPhotographer.title: 8. Cancellation by Photographer
cancellationByPhotographer.intro: When a photographer cancels a booking, the client always receives a 100% refund, regardless of timing. Photographers are expected to honour confirmed bookings.

items.replacement: If the photographer cancels less than 48 hours before the shoot, Photo Portugal will attempt to find a replacement photographer
items.repeated: Repeated cancellations (3 or more within a 3-month period) may result in loss of Featured status, reduced visibility, or account suspension

items.free: Free reschedule: one reschedule per booking is free if requested 48+ hours before the shoot
items.late: Late reschedule: requests within 48 hours are at the photographer's discretion
items.weather: Weather reschedule: either party may request a free reschedule due to weather conditions unsuitable for outdoor photography — no penalties or fees apply

photoDelivery.title: 10. Photo Delivery
photoDelivery.intro: Delivery timelines are set by the photographer in each package (typically 3–14 days).

items.gallery: Photos are delivered via a private, password-protected gallery on Photo Portugal
items.latePartial: If the photographer exceeds the delivery deadline by 3 or more days, the client may request a partial refund (up to 20% of the booking amount)
items.lateFullRefund: If the photographer fails to deliver within 14 days after the deadline, the client receives a full refund and the photographer's account may be suspended
items.acceptance: After delivery, the client has 7 days to accept the photos or open a dispute
items.autoRelease: If the client does not respond within 7 days, the photographer may contact support to resolve the payment release. After 14 days of client inactivity, payment is automatically released to the photographer
items.galleryAccess: Delivered photo galleries remain accessible for 90 days

disputes.title: 11. Disputes & Quality Guarantee
disputes.intro: If you are unsatisfied with the delivered photos, you may open a dispute within 7 days of delivery. Photo Portugal will review the dispute and respond within 5 business days, working with both parties to reach a fair resolution.

grounds.fewer: Significantly fewer photos than promised in the package
grounds.wrongLocation: Photos taken at the wrong location or of the wrong subjects
grounds.technical: Severe technical issues (extreme blur, overexposure, corruption)

resolutions.reshoot: Reshoot: the photographer agrees to redo the session at no additional cost
resolutions.partial: Partial refund: 20–50% of the booking amount, depending on the severity
resolutions.full: Full refund: in cases of photographer no-show or complete failure to deliver

disputes.subjectiveNote: Subjective preferences ("I don't like the editing style") are not grounds for a refund. We encourage clients to review photographer portfolios and discuss their vision before booking.

forceMajeure.title: 12. Force Majeure
forceMajeure.content: Neither party shall be liable for failure to perform due to circumstances beyond reasonable control, including but not limited to: natural disasters, severe weather, government restrictions, pandemics, or civil unrest. In such cases, both parties are entitled to a full refund or free reschedule.

intellectualProperty.title: 13. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.intro: Photographers retain full copyright of all images they create. Clients receive a personal-use license for the photos from their session.

personalUse.socialMedia: Sharing on personal social media accounts (Instagram, Facebook, etc.)
personalUse.wallpaper: Using as phone/desktop wallpaper or profile photos

intellectualProperty.notPermittedTitle: Not permitted without photographer's written consent:

notPermitted.editing: Editing or altering photos beyond basic cropping and filters

intellectualProperty.photographerUse: By booking a session, the client agrees that the photographer may use photos from the session in their portfolio, on their Photo Portugal profile, and for professional marketing purposes (website, social media, promotional materials). If the client does not wish their photos to be published, they must inform the photographer before or during the session. The photographer is obligated to respect this request.
intellectualProperty.platformDisclaimer: Photo Portugal does not claim ownership of any photos created during sessions booked through the platform. Any disputes regarding image usage are between the client and the photographer. Photo Portugal may assist in resolving such disputes but is not liable for unauthorized use of images by either party.

items.fakePortfolio: Portfolio photos that are not your own work
items.offPlatform: Attempting to arrange bookings or payments outside the platform to avoid fees
items.externalLinks: Including personal website URLs, social media links (Instagram, Facebook, etc.), email addresses, or phone numbers in your profile bio, tagline, package descriptions, or portfolio captions. All client communication must go through Photo Portugal's messaging system.

platformRole.title: 15. Platform Role & Liability
platformRole.content: Photo Portugal is a marketplace that facilitates connections between clients and photographers. While we verify photographer profiles, moderate reviews, and provide dispute resolution, we are not a party to the service agreement between clients and photographers. Photo Portugal is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Our total liability is limited to the amount of the booking in question.

disputeResolution.title: 16. Dispute Resolution & Governing Law
disputeResolution.content1: All disputes between users shall first be resolved through Photo Portugal's internal dispute resolution process as described in Section 11. If the internal process does not lead to a satisfactory resolution, parties agree to attempt mediation before pursuing legal action.
disputeResolution.content2: These terms are governed by the laws of Portugal. Any legal proceedings shall be brought in the courts of Lisbon, Portugal.

chargebacks.title: 17. Payment Chargebacks
chargebacks.content: If a client initiates a chargeback through their bank or credit card provider instead of using Photo Portugal's dispute process, we reserve the right to suspend their account pending investigation. Photographers affected by chargebacks will be notified and may provide evidence to contest the chargeback. Fraudulent chargebacks may result in permanent account suspension.

howToBook.question: How do I book a photographer?
howToBook.answer: Browse our photographer listings and filter by location, style, and availability. Choose a package that fits your needs, select your preferred date and time, and complete the booking. Your payment is securely held by Stripe until after your photoshoot and photo delivery.

paymentProtection.question: How does payment protection work?
paymentProtection.answer: Your payment is held securely in escrow by Stripe — it is never sent directly to the photographer. The money is only released after you receive your edited photos and confirm you're satisfied. If something goes wrong, you can open a dispute and receive a partial or full refund. This means zero risk for you.

cancelReschedule.question: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
cancelReschedule.answer:
Yes. You can cancel or reschedule through your dashboard.

**Cancellation refunds:**
• 7+ days before the shoot — 100% refund
• 3–7 days before — 50% refund
• Less than 3 days — No refund
• No-show — No refund

**Rescheduling:** You get one free reschedule if requested 48+ hours before the session. Rescheduling within 48 hours is at the photographer's discretion. Weather-related rescheduling is always free.

**If the photographer cancels or reschedules:** You always receive a 100% full refund, regardless of timing. If the cancellation happens less than 48 hours before the shoot, Photo Portugal will try to find a replacement photographer for you.

noShow.question: What if I can't make it to my photoshoot?
noShow.answer:
If you don't show up to your scheduled session without cancelling in advance, it is treated as a no-show and no refund is issued. The full payment goes to the photographer as compensation for their reserved time.

We strongly recommend cancelling as early as possible if your plans change — cancelling 7+ days ahead gives you a full refund.

receivePhotos.question: How do I receive my photos?
receivePhotos.answer: After your photoshoot, the photographer will edit and upload your photos to a private, password-protected gallery. You'll receive an email and dashboard notification with the gallery link and password. You can view photos online, download them individually, or download the full set as a ZIP file. Your gallery remains accessible for 90 days.

notHappy.question: What if I'm not happy with my photos?
notHappy.answer:
You have 7 days after delivery to review your photos. If there's a legitimate issue, you can open a dispute through your dashboard.

**Valid grounds for disputes:**
• Significantly fewer photos than promised
• Wrong location or subjects
• Severe technical issues (blur, exposure problems)
• Photographer no-show or incomplete session

**Possible resolutions:**
• Reshoot at no extra cost
• Partial refund (20–50%)
• Full refund

Please note that subjective preferences like editing style are not grounds for a refund.

paymentReleased.question: When is my payment released to the photographer?
paymentReleased.answer:
Your payment is released to the photographer only after you accept the photo delivery in your dashboard. You have 7 days to review and either accept or open a dispute.

If you don't respond within 14 days after delivery, the payment is automatically released to the photographer. This ensures photographers are fairly compensated even if clients forget to click 'accept'.

dateNegotiation.question: Can I change the date after booking?
dateNegotiation.answer: Yes. Both you and the photographer can propose a new date at any time while the booking is pending. When a new date is proposed, the other party receives an email and SMS notification. They can accept the proposed date or suggest a different one. The booking stays in 'pending' status until both sides agree on a date.

messagingPhotos.question: Can I send photos in messages?
messagingPhotos.answer: Yes. You can attach photos to messages by clicking the image icon next to the text input. Select a photo, optionally add a text caption, and send. The photo will appear in the chat for both you and the photographer.

promoCodes.question: How do I use a promo code?
promoCodes.answer: If you have a promo code, you can apply it during checkout. The discount will be applied to your booking total before payment. Promo codes may offer a percentage discount or a fixed amount off.

smsNotifications.question: Will I receive SMS notifications?
smsNotifications.answer: Yes, if you add your phone number in Settings. You'll receive SMS for: booking confirmations, shoot reminders (24 hours before), photo delivery notifications, and date change proposals. You can manage SMS preferences in your notification settings.

getStarted.question: How do I get started as a photographer?
getStarted.answer:
Getting started is simple:

1. **Create your account** — Sign up and select 'I take photos'
2. **Complete your profile** — Add a photo, cover image, bio, and tagline
3. **Upload your portfolio** — Showcase at least 5–10 of your best shots
4. **Create packages** — Set up 2–3 packages at different price points
5. **Select your locations** — Mark where you're available to shoot
6. **Connect Stripe** — Required to receive payments

Once your profile is complete and approved by our team, you'll appear in search results and can start receiving bookings.

subscriptionPlans.question: What subscription plans are available?
subscriptionPlans.answer:
We offer three plans:

**Free** — No monthly fee, 20% commission per booking. Basic listing with 1 location.

**Pro** — 15% commission. 5 locations, 10 packages, analytics dashboard, and priority support.

**Premium** — 10% commission. All locations, unlimited packages, custom profile URL, full analytics, and featured placement options.

All plans include up to 100 portfolio photos, Stripe payment processing, client messaging, and access to the booking system. Visit our pricing page for current plan prices.

getPaid.question: How and when do I get paid?
getPaid.answer:
Payments are processed through Stripe Connect. After a client accepts their photo delivery, your earnings (package price minus platform commission) are transferred to your connected Stripe account. Stripe typically processes payouts within 2–7 business days depending on your country and bank.

You can track all your earnings and pending payouts in your dashboard.

clientCancels.question: What happens when a client cancels?
clientCancels.answer:
The compensation you receive depends on when the client cancels:

• 7+ days before — Client gets full refund, you receive nothing
• 3–7 days before — Client gets 50% refund, you receive 50% (minus commission)
• Less than 3 days — No refund to client, you receive the full amount (minus commission)
• Client no-show — You receive the full amount (minus commission)

Platform commission applies only to the amount you actually receive.

deliverPhotos.question: How do I deliver photos to clients?
deliverPhotos.answer:
After the photoshoot, go to the booking in your dashboard and click 'Deliver Photos'. Upload the edited photos, set a gallery password, and submit. The client will receive an email notification with the gallery link.

Please deliver within the timeframe specified in your package. Late delivery (3+ days) may result in the client requesting a partial refund. Delivery more than 14 days late may result in a full refund and possible account penalties.

photographerCancels.question: What if I need to cancel a session?
photographerCancels.answer:
If you need to cancel, do so through your dashboard as early as possible. The client always receives a 100% refund regardless of timing.

If you cancel less than 48 hours before the shoot, Photo Portugal may attempt to find a replacement photographer for the client.

**Important:** Repeated cancellations (3 or more in 3 months) may result in loss of Featured status, reduced search visibility, or account suspension.

externalLinks.question: Can I add my Instagram or website to my profile?
externalLinks.answer:
No. Photographers are not allowed to include personal website URLs, social media links (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, etc.), email addresses, or phone numbers anywhere on their profile — including bio, tagline, package descriptions, and portfolio captions.

All communication with clients must go through Photo Portugal's built-in messaging system. This protects both parties by keeping conversations documented, payments secure, and disputes resolvable.

Profiles found to contain external links or contact information will be asked to remove them. Repeated violations may result in account suspension.

phoneRequired.question: Why do I need to add a phone number?
phoneRequired.answer: A verified phone number is required to complete your profile and get approved. It's used for important SMS notifications about bookings, payments, and shoot reminders. Add your phone number in your Profile page with your country code.

dateNegotiationPhotographer.question: How do I propose a different date to a client?
dateNegotiationPhotographer.answer: On your Bookings page, find the pending booking and click 'Propose different date'. Select your preferred date, optionally add a note explaining why, and submit. The client will receive an email and SMS notification and can accept or suggest another date.

videoReviews.question: What are video reviews?
videoReviews.answer: Clients can leave video reviews in addition to text reviews. Video reviews must be at least 10 seconds long, show the client on camera, and share their genuine experience. Video reviews are reviewed by our team before publishing. Clients who leave approved video reviews may receive a discount code for future bookings.

realTimeChat.question: How does messaging work?
realTimeChat.answer: Messages are delivered in real-time — you'll see new messages appear instantly without refreshing the page. A green dot indicates an active connection. You can send text messages and photos. You'll also receive email and SMS notifications for new messages (if enabled in settings).

escrowSystem.question: How does the escrow system work?
escrowSystem.answer:
Our escrow system protects both clients and photographers:

1. **Client books** — Payment is collected and held securely by Stripe
2. **Photoshoot happens** — Money stays in escrow
3. **Photographer delivers** — Edited photos uploaded to private gallery
4. **Client reviews** — 7 days to accept or open a dispute
5. **Payment released** — After acceptance, photographer receives their share

If no action is taken within 14 days of delivery, payment auto-releases to the photographer. This system ensures photographers get paid for their work and clients get the photos they expect.

serviceFees.question: What are the service fees?
serviceFees.answer:
**For clients:** A 10% service fee is added on top of the package price. For example, a €300 package costs €330 total. This fee covers payment processing, platform maintenance, and client support.

**For photographers:** A commission is deducted from each booking based on your plan:
• Free plan — 20% commission
• Pro plan — 15% commission
• Premium plan — 10% commission

There are no hidden fees. All fees are displayed transparently before any transaction.

refundPolicy.question: What is the refund policy?
refundPolicy.answer:
**Client cancellation refunds:**
• 7+ days before — 100% refund
• 3–7 days before — 50% refund
• Less than 3 days — No refund
• No-show — No refund

**Photographer cancellation:** Always 100% refund to the client.

**After delivery:** If a legitimate issue is found, dispute resolution may result in partial refund (20–50%) or full refund.

**Late delivery:** 3+ days late — up to 20% refund. 14+ days late — full refund.

**Force majeure:** Full refund or free reschedule for events beyond anyone's control.

disputes.question: How do disputes work?
disputes.answer:
If something goes wrong with your booking or photos, you can open a dispute through your dashboard within 7 days of delivery.

**The process:**
1. Submit a dispute with the reason and description
2. Our team reviews the case within 5 business days
3. We may contact both parties for additional information
4. A resolution is offered: reshoot, partial refund, or full refund

**Valid dispute grounds:** Fewer photos than promised, wrong location/subjects, technical issues, photographer no-show.

**Not valid:** Subjective editing preferences, minor style differences.

rainPolicy.question: What if it rains on my photoshoot day?
rainPolicy.answer:
Weather-related rescheduling is always free for both clients and photographers, with no penalties. If bad weather is expected, either party can request a reschedule.

Many photographers are experienced with indoor alternatives or covered locations — discuss backup options with your photographer when booking.

forcesMajeure.question: What about emergencies or natural disasters?
forcesMajeure.answer:
In case of force majeure events — natural disasters, severe weather warnings, pandemics, or other circumstances beyond anyone's control — both parties are entitled to a full refund or free reschedule with no penalties.

Photo Portugal will work with both parties to find the best solution.

contactSupport.question: How do I contact support?
contactSupport.answer:
You can reach our support team through:

• **Email:** hello@photoportugal.com
• **Dashboard:** Photographers can submit support tickets directly from their dashboard
• **Contact page:** Visit our contact page to send us a message

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.
